calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-24-2020 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-24-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Carmelita M Sealana et al.

Dept: 514. Judge: Gerardo C Sandoval. Clerk: R. Sahatjian. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768. Email: casey.giselle@gmail.com.

Kambrie L. Keith, esq. appeared for plaintiff American Express National Bank. Plaintiff's witness Mario Morales-Arias, Custodian of Records, was sworn and gave testimony.
No Appearance by defendant Carmelita M. Sealana.
Plaintiff's complaint for Collections/Common Counts was filed on March 07, 2019.
Defendant Carmelita M. Sealana answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on May 03, 2019.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on Oct-04-2019, setting trial for today, Feb-24-2020.

The Court makes a finding that defendant Carmelita M. Sealana has voluntarily absented herself from today's proceedings and does not wish to contest the allegations set for in plaintiff's complaint. Plaintiff submits an oral motion to dismiss Does 1 to 20 inclusive.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff American Express National Bank, and against defendant Carmelita M. Sealana, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $13,351.96
Costs - $444.95
Total - $13,796.91

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2019 Set For Trial On Feb-24-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
